items.title: Mental Health Progress Coloring Page (This Counts)
items.description: Not spiraling today? That’s progress. Printable goblin coloring page celebrating small wins and quiet victories.

items.title: Anxiety Recovery Printable (Calm Is Progress)
items.description: For the days when nothing went wrong—and that’s everything. Relatable goblin printable for anxiety recovery and grounding.

items.title: Goblin Core Affirmation (Peaceful Chaos Edition)
items.description: Soft, quiet, slightly feral healing. A cozy goblin-core printable reminding you that not spiraling is enough.

items.title: Relatable Mental Health Meme Coloring Page (Too Real)
items.description: When your biggest accomplishment today was not falling apart. Printable goblin meme for real-life mental health moments.

items.title: Realistic Motivation Printable (No Spiral = Win)
items.description: Forget toxic positivity. This printable celebrates staying stable, even when that’s the only goal.
